description: Data lifecycle policy catalog for GrantLayer. Defines representative lifecycle states and transitions. This is a design artifact; no lifecycle automation is implemented.

policies.description: Data is currently in use, readable, writable, and included in active backups.
policies.retentionNotes: No automatic deletion. Retained as long as the record is active or institutionally relevant.
policies.auditabilityNotes: All state changes are logged as audit events.

policies.description: Data is no longer actively accessed but retained for compliance or historical reference.
policies.retentionNotes: Read-only. Retained according to institutional policy, typically months to years.
policies.deletionNotes: May be expired after retention period passes. Cannot be deleted without audit trail.
policies.auditabilityNotes: Archival action is itself an audit event.

policies.description: Data is kept for institutional audit and compliance purposes. Immutable.
policies.retentionNotes: Years, possibly indefinite. Governed by compliance requirements, not ordinary data retention.
policies.deletionNotes: Must not be destructively deleted. Transition to legal-hold if required longer than planned.
policies.auditabilityNotes: Every access and query may be logged depending on future compliance policy.

policies.description: Data is kept for legal or regulatory proceedings. Must not be deleted.
policies.retentionNotes: Duration determined by legal counsel or regulator. Overrides ordinary retention schedules.
policies.deletionNotes: Deletion prohibited while legal hold is active. Must be explicitly released by authorized party.
policies.auditabilityNotes: Legal hold placement and release are high-sensitivity audit events.

policies.description: Data has passed its retention period and is pending deletion or purge review.
policies.retentionNotes: Grace period for operator review before final purge.
policies.deletionNotes: May be restored from expired state if needed, or advanced to deletion_pending.
policies.auditabilityNotes: Expiration event is logged. Operator review is required before purge.

policies.description: Data is marked for deletion, awaiting operator confirmation or automated purge.
policies.retentionNotes: Short window (e.g., days) for operator to cancel or confirm purge.
policies.deletionNotes: Requires operator approval or automated job with audit logging.
policies.auditabilityNotes: Deletion approval and execution are audit events.

policies.description: Data is no longer stored in primary or backup systems, or has been cryptographically shredded.
policies.retentionNotes: No retention. A record of the purge is the only remaining artifact.
policies.deletionNotes: Irreversible. Must not impact audit/provenance records.
policies.auditabilityNotes: Purge event itself is an immutable audit event.

metadata.note: No lifecycle automation, retention jobs, or deletion jobs are implemented. This catalog defines intended policies for future implementation.
